zh.of Hertfordshire, England: 英國素福爾可素德波利
zh.of Hertford Priory, Hertfordshire, Engla: 英國賀特福爾賀特福德
zh.lifeSummary: 當Ralph de Limesi於大約1067年出生在法國諾門迪瑟-馬利時，他的父親Ralph de Limesi29歲，母親Christina28歲。他於大約1089年與Hadvisa在英國英格蘭賀特福爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他去世於1129年之前在英國素福爾可素德波利。

zh-hans.of Hertfordshire, England: 英国素福爾可素德波利
zh-hans.of Hertford Priory, Hertfordshire, Engla: 英国賀特福爾賀特福德
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ralph de Limesi于大约1067年出生在法国諾門迪瑟-馬利时，他的父亲Ralph de Limesi29岁，母亲Christina28岁。他于大约1089年与Hadvisa在英国英格兰賀特福爾结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。他去世于1129年之前在英国素福爾可素德波利。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Limesi
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Spanish (Limés): habitational name from Limés in Oviedo province, northern Spain.

nameMeanings.name: Ralph
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

variants.name: Ralf
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

historicEvents.title: Domesday Book
historicEvents.description: Domesday Book is Britain's earliest extant public record with information containing land surveys and landholdings commissioned by William I. The book was completed in 1086.

historicEvents.title: The Crusades
historicEvents.description: A series of religious wars between Christians and Muslims, known as the Crusades, occurred between 1096 and 1291, and played a large role in European Christian dominance in the Middle East.

historicEvents.title: The Battle of Tichebray
historicEvents.description: King Henry I defeated and captured his brother, Robert of Normandy, at the Battle of Tinchebray in 1106. Robert remained in captivity until his death in 1134.

en.lifeSummary: When Ralph de Limesi was born about 1067, in Seine-Maritime, Normandy, France, his father, Ralph de Limesi, was 29 and his mother, Christina, was 28. He married Hadvisa about 1089, in Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He died before 1129, in Sudbury, Suffolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ralph de Limesi est né environ 1067, à Seine-Maritime, Normandie, France, son père, Ralph de Limesi, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Christina, avait 28 ans. Il a épousé Hadvisa environ 1089, à Hertfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Il est décédé avant 1129, à Sudbury, Suffolk, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Ralph de Limesi um 1067 in Seine-Maritime, Normandie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Ralph de Limesi 29 und seine Mutter Christina 28. Er hat um 1089 in Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom Hadvisa geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Er starb vor 1129 in Sudbury, Suffolk, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ralph de Limesi è nato il circa 1067 nel Seine-Maritime, Normandie, Francia, il suo padre, Ralph de Limesi, aveva 29 anni e il suo madre, Christina, aveva 28 anni. Lui sposato Hadvisa circa 1089, nel Hertfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì prima del 1129, nel Sudbury, Suffolk, England.

ja.of Hertfordshire, England: イギリススフォルクスドブリー
ja.of Suffolk or Hertfordshire, England: イギリスイギリスハートフォードシュアイア
ja.Hertfordshire, England: イギリスハートフォードシュアイア
ja.Pirton, Hertfordshire, England: イギリスハートフォードシュアイアピルトン
ja.of Hertford Priory, Hertfordshire, Engla: イギリスハートフォードシュアイアハートフォード
ja.lifeSummary: Ralph de Limesiが約1067年にフランスノーマンディセアイネ-マリティメで生まれた時，父Ralph de Limesiは29歳，母Christinaは28歳であった。約1089年にイギリスイギリスハートフォードシュアイアでHadvisaと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼は1129年以前にイギリススフォルクスドブリーで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Ralph de Limesi(이)가 대략 1067년 프랑스 노먼디 세이인-마이팀에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Ralph de Limesi(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Christina(은)는 28세였다. 그는 대략 1089년 영국 잉글랜드 허트퍼드실르에서 Hadvisa(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1129년 이전 영국 수폴크 수드버이에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ralph de Limesi nasceu aproximadamente 1067, em Seine-Maritime, Normandie, França, seu pai, Ralph de Limesi, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Christina, tinha 28 anos. Ele casou-se com Hadvisa aproximadamente 1089, em Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ele faleceu antes 1129, em Sudbury, Suffolk, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ralph de Limesi родился около 1067 г. в местности сине-маритим, норманди, Франция, его отцу по имени Ralph de Limesi было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Christina, 28. Он женился на женщине по имени Hadvisa около 1089 г. в местности хиртфордшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Он умер перед 1129 г. в местности судбури, суффолк, Англия.

sm.about 1067–before 1129: e tusa o le 1067–a'e le'I oo le 1129

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Ralph de Limesi nació aproximadamente 1067, en Seine-Maritime, Normandie, Francia, su papá, Ralph de Limesi, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Christina, tenía 28 años. Se casó con Hadvisa aproximadamente 1089, en Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió antes de 1129, en Sudbury, Suffolk, Inglaterra.
